---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Zerly AI
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem / Motivation

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.  
Example: "I find it frustrating when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, examples from other tools, or links that help explain the idea.
